no: Brings Corwin to SoA/ToB and Caelar to ToB. 200+ dialogues, 12 quests, items, cutscenes. Has built-in compat patches for Blackhearts EET, CGS, and The Longer Road. Incompatible with Shine on Caelar. Optional LCA Assistant prompt during install.

conflicts.reason: Both mods add Corwin as a companion in BG2. Cannot use together.
Both mods modify Caelars storyline. LCA website explicitly lists Shine on Caelar as incompatible.

sum: Recruits Corwin in Shadows of Amn and Caelar in Throne of Bhaal with 200+ dialogues, 12 quests, new items, and AI-generated voicing.
